zh.lifeSummary: 當Elin Eriksdotter Kagg於1555年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德特瑟爾額馬爾奧可時，她的父親Erik Mattiasson Kagg15歲，母親Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad17歲。她於1583年10月與Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum在瑞典斯卡拉波格結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和11個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年12月7日在她的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在瑞典索德曼藍德特瑟爾額。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elin Eriksdotter Kagg于1555年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德特瑟爾額馬爾奧可时，她的父亲Erik Mattiasson Kagg15岁，母亲Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad17岁。她于1583年10月与Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum在瑞典斯卡拉波格结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和11个女儿的父母。她去世于1615年12月7日在她的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在瑞典索德曼藍德特瑟爾額。

nameMeanings.name: Kagg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German and South German Kägi: topographic name from Gehegi, from Middle High German gehage ‘hedge, fence’ (see Kage ).
In some cases possibly also South German (Kägy): variant of Kägi (see 1 above). This surname is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Kage
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Hermann, Wilhelm.
topographic name from a shortened form of Middle High German gehage ‘hedge, fence’, a term denoting an enclosed settlement in otherwise wild terrain.

nameMeanings.name: Elin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Elen
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

historicEvents.description: Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Elin Eriksdotter Kagg was born in 1555, in Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Södermanland, Sweden, her father, Erik Mattiasson Kagg, was 15 and her mother, Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad, was 17. She married Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum in October 1583, in Skaraborg, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 11 daughters. She died on 7 December 1615, in her hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Ytterselö, Södermanland, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elin Eriksdotter Kagg est née en 1555, à Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Södermanland, Suède, son père, Erik Mattiasson Kagg, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum en octobre 1583, à Skaraborg, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 11 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Ytterselö, Södermanland, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elin Eriksdotter Kagg 1555 in Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Södermanland, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Erik Mattiasson Kagg 15 und ihre Mutter Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad 17. Sie hat im Oktober 1583 in Skaraborg, Schweden Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1615 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ytterselö, Södermanland, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Eriksdotter Kagg è nata il nel 1555 nel Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Södermanland, Svezia, sua padre, Erik Mattiasson Kagg, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum nel ottobre 1583, nel Skaraborg, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 11 figlie. Morì il 7 dicembre 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Ytterselö, Södermanland, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elin Eriksdotter Kaggが1555年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドイッテルセルoムaルスaカーで生まれた時，父Erik Mattiasson Kaggは15歳，母Beata Andersdotter Ekebladは17歳であった。1583年10月にスウェーデンスカラボルグでHans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurumと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年12月7日に故郷で60歳で死去し，スウェーデンスoデルマンランドイッテルセルoにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elin Eriksdotter Kagg(이)가 1555년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 이터셀o a스a커에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Erik Mattiasson Kagg(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1583년 10월 스웨덴 스카라볼그에서 Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 12월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 이터셀o에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Eriksdotter Kagg nasceu em 1555, em Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Södermanland, Suécia, seu pai, Erik Mattiasson Kagg, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum em outubro de 1583, em Skaraborg, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 11 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Ytterselö, Södermanland, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elin Eriksdotter Kagg родилась в 1555 г. в местности мaлсaкир, иттирселo, сoдирманланд, Швеция, её отцу по имени Erik Mattiasson Kagg было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum октябрь 1583 г. в местности скараборг, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Она умерла 7 декабря 1615 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности иттирселo, сoдирманланд, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elin Eriksdotter Kagg nació en 1555, en Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Södermanland, Suecia, su papá, Erik Mattiasson Kagg, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Hans Åkesson Soop till Stora Bjurum en octubre de 1583, en Skaraborg, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1615, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Ytterselö, Södermanland, Suecia.
